title: Reach
Our Store
hero.subtitle: Whether you seek a custom order, wish to visit our showrooms, or simply have a question — we are here.

intro.title: Every inquiry deserves {{em}}the care of a reply{{/em}}
intro.text: We believe that the relationship between a store and its patrons should be as enduring as the garments we offer. Whether you are ordering a piece for a special occasion, seeking guidance on sizing and fit, or wishing to arrange a visit to our showrooms — we read every message with the same attention we give to every detail.

form.title: Send Us {{em}}Your Word{{/em}}

placeholders.name: e.g. Amira Benali
placeholders.subject: e.g. Custom burnous for wedding
placeholders.message: Tell us about your occasion, your size, your preferred region of craft, or any questions you may have...

form.error: Failed to send your message. Please try again.

success.title: Your words have reached us.
success.subtitle: We will reply within 24 hours during business days.

contactInfo.title: Speak with {{em}}Our Team{{/em}}
contactInfo.subtitle: Our store team is available six days a week to assist with orders, custom requests, and showroom appointments. For urgent matters, WhatsApp receives the fastest response.

commissions.title: Bespoke {{em}}Pieces{{/em}}
commissions.desc: For {{strong}}custom orders{{/strong}} — wedding burnous, bridal chedda, ceremonial ensembles, or kids' traditional outfits — we recommend scheduling a consultation either in person at our Algiers showroom or via video call. {{strong}}Delivery time is typically 3–6 weeks{{/strong}} depending on complexity and artisan availability.
commissions.note: Please include your event date, preferred region of craft (Tlemcen, Constantine, Kabylie), and any reference images in your message.

partnerships.title: Collaborate {{em}}With Us{{/em}}
partnerships.text: For press inquiries, wholesale partnerships, or supplier collaboration proposals, please direct your message to {{email}}. We welcome conversations that advance the cause of Algerian traditional clothing.

showrooms.title: Our {{em}}Showrooms{{/em}}
showrooms.subtitle: You are welcome to visit us at any of our locations to see, touch, and try the pieces before buying.

faq.title: Frequently {{em}}Asked{{/em}}
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions we receive most often.

items.q: How long does a custom burnous order take?
items.a: A bespoke burnous requires 14–18 days from order to delivery. Our partner artisans source the finest wool, weave on traditional looms, and add hand-stitched trim work. For urgent occasions, please contact us directly — we maintain a small reserve of ready-to-wear pieces.
We currently ship within Algeria only. We are working on expanding international shipping soon — stay tuned for updates.
You are welcome to visit our showrooms. To check availability and schedule a visit, please contact us via the contact form or WhatsApp and we will get back to you promptly.

We offer a 30-day return window for unworn pieces in original condition with all tags and certificates intact. Custom orders are non-returnable but may be adjusted within 14 days of receipt. Return shipping is complimentary within Algeria.
Every order ships in protective packaging designed to ensure your piece arrives in perfect condition.
